visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with a serious and intense expression. He is wearing large, black over-ear headphones and looking down at something just out of frame. The lighting is dim, casting shadows on his face. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio consists solely of a tense and suspenseful instrumental track. A low, pulsing electronic beat creates a steady, rhythmic foundation, while high-pitched, synthesized notes weave a complex and slightly dissonant melody. The overall mood is one of high-tech intrigue and concentration, as if someone is deeply focused on analyzing data or listening intently to something important. The camera cuts to a close-up of a computer monitor displaying complex data. A hand enters the frame from the right, pointing to a specific section of the blue and white graphs and lines on the dark screen. The numbers "456." and "453." are visible on the left side of the display. The white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner. The shot returns to the man, now seen from a slightly different angle. He is still wearing the headphones, but now has in-ear monitors. He looks up and to the side with a look of concentration
